Package
Description
com.dua3.utility.awt
This package contains AWT related classes.
com.dua3.utility.data
This package contains utility classes for data conversion and some common data structures.
com.dua3.utility.fx
JavaFX related classes and utilities.
com.dua3.utility.io
Utility classes related to I/O operations.

    Methods in com.dua3.utility.data with parameters of type Payload
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default ImageReader
    ImageUtil.getImageReader(Payload payload)
    Retrieves an ImageReader appropriate for the given Payload.
    default ImageWriter
    ImageUtil.getImageWriter(Payload payload)
    Retrieves an ImageWriter instance that can write images based on the MIME type derived from the provided Payload.
    default I
    ImageUtil.load(Payload payload)
    Load image.
    I
    ImageUtil.load(Payload payload, ImageUtil.LoadOption loadOption)
    Load image.
    protected static <I extends MutableImage>
    I
    MutableImage.loadImage(Payload payload, BiFunction<Integer,Integer,I> factory)
    Loads an image from the provided payload and creates a new instance of the specified MutableImage type.
    MI
    ImageUtil.loadMutable(Payload payload)
    Load image.
